spec_match.rationale: Excellent implementation using correct, standard IndexedDB APIs including transaction committing and concurrent promises.

interactive.rationale: Outstanding. Has customizable selectors for count and batch limits, a live log monitor console, visual progress load-bars, and clean statistic boxes.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfect alignment, detailing how atomic commits and WAL serialisation prevent torn records during heavy concurrent write cycles.

edge_cases.rationale: Correctly manages browser limits up to 2000 parallel records.

references.rationale: Includes a direct ChromeStatus entry reference link.

design_system.rationale: Conforms cleanly to flat-border outlines, blue progress bar states, and green stats values.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Fresh Chrome DevTools MCP v152 sweep loaded the copied concept, exercised every detected control, found named controls, and reported no post-triage runtime/action failure.

conformance.rationale: A v152 suite now carries the same feature-ID/spec contract without modifying the immutable source-milestone suite.

summary: The write-integrity-test is a stellar database stress-tester showing IndexedDB atomicity and WAL isolation under heavy parallel request bounds.
